description.value:
You have uncanny ease to learn lost or forgotten techniques.

Source: Mechanics/Character_Options/Occupations/Ninja Technician.md

Category: Core

Prerequisite: Age 12+

Skills: Genjutsu 2 ranks, Knowledge (ninja lore) 2 ranks and Ninjutsu 2 ranks.

Feat: Select one from Genjutsu Adept, Ninjutsu Adept.

Reputation Bonus Increase: +1

Expertise: You require 1 less success to learn Lost Hijutsu and Lost Kinjutsu techniques of any type (minimum 1).
